generated_oml:
instance StyrofoamBox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulation box maintaining thermal stability in incubator"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heating element for temperature control in incubator"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Air circulation fan for uniform temperature distribution"
]

instance Ds18s20TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for real-time temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance IncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Enclosed space for incubator operation with temperature regulation"
    base:contains StyrofoamBox, Heatbed, Fan, Ds18s20TemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Ds18s20TemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4, SimulationEnabler, ScipyOptimizer
]

instance IncubatorCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric CAD representation of incubator structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance ThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using differential equations for thermal dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NonLinearLeastSquaresSolver, SimulationEnabler
]

instance SafetyStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current safety status of the incubator system"
]

instance PerformanceStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current performance status regarding optimal temperature regulation"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of system faults or anomalies in the incubator"
]

instance EstimatedTemperatureStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated internal temperature state based on sensor data"
]

instance PredictedTemperatureProfileInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected temperature profile under current operating conditions"
]

instance OptimizedHeatingControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimized control action for heating element to maintain target temperature"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CalibratedModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated model parameters for accurate simulation"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of system safety and optimal performance for incubator"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyStatusInsight, PerformanceStatusInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation of incubator behavior under current operating conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedTemperatureProfileInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection using specialized algorithms to identify system anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation to infer system states from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides EstimatedTemperatureStateInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of control strategies using supervisory controllers and optimisers"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedHeatingControlAction
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration of analytical models using non-linear least squares solver"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedModelInsight
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B embedded control system for data acquisition and processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, OptimizationService
]

instance RabbitMQServer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server for reliable message queuing between components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ScipyOptimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for numerical optimization of control strategies"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance NonLinearLeastSquaresSolver : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Non-linear least squares solver for model parameter calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation engine for predictive modeling of incubator behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates modeling, simulation, monitoring, and optimization technologies via calibration algorithms that update models of the Cyber-Physical System and environment using sensor data to estimate parameters, monitors that evaluate system safety and optimal performance, and human or algorithmic decision processes that initiate changes to the Physical Twin when violations are detected."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update cyber-physical system (CPS) and environmental models with parameter estimates derived from sensor data. Monitors verify system safety and optimality, while fault detectors and state estimators within algorithms detect anomalies and correct errors."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "In order to keep the device in a safe state, a safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver."
]
